asi.notes: 706 lines across index.ts(263) + utils.ts(200) + state.ts(38) + zip-repo/index.ts(205). Targets: remove section comments, fix README inconsistency, remove duplicate SAFE_PLAN_TOOLS, consider removing vitest.config.ts

description: Remove noise: section comments, duplicate const, vitest.config.ts, numbered step comments, fix README

asi.hypothesis: Remove section comments, duplicate SAFE_PLAN_TOOLS, vitest.config.ts, numbered comments in zip-repo, fix README shortcut
asi.changes: index.ts: removed 10 section comments + deduplicated SAFE_PLAN_TOOLS Set. utils.ts: removed 6 section comments. state.ts: removed 2 section comments. zip-repo/index.ts: removed 15 numbered step comments. Deleted vitest.config.ts (default-only config). Fixed README shortcut Ctrl+Alt+P → Cmd+P.

asi.hypothesis: sanitizePlanTools(DEFAULT_PLAN_TOOLS) is identity — remove the call

asi.hypothesis: Remove redundant initialization and duplicate notify call

description: Extract errMsg helper — net +2 lines, reverting

description: Consolidate regex patterns: merge 60+ single-command patterns into grouped alternations

asi.hypothesis: Merge simple bare-command regex patterns into single alternation regexes in utils.ts
asi.result: 621→566 (-55 lines). DESTRUCTIVE_PATTERNS: 14 file-op patterns→1, 7 process/power patterns→3. SAFE_PATTERNS: 35 bare-command patterns→1, 6 modern-tool patterns→1. All 79 tests pass — identical matching behavior.
asi.changes: utils.ts DESTRUCTIVE_PATTERNS: merged rm/rmdir/mv/cp/mkdir/touch/chmod/chown/chgrp/ln/tee/truncate/dd/shred into single alternation. Merged sudo+su, kill+pkill+killall, reboot+shutdown. SAFE_PATTERNS: merged 35 bare-command patterns into single alternation, merged jq/awk/rg/fd/bat/eza into single alternation.

description: Merge two git rev-parse calls into one in zip-repo (guard was redundant)

asi.changes: Merged two git rev-parse calls into one in zip-repo — --show-toplevel fails outside git repos just like --is-inside-work-tree, so the separate guard was redundant

description: Un-export WRITING_TOOL_NAMES and BLOCK_REASON_HEADER (not used outside utils.ts)

asi.changes: Un-exported WRITING_TOOL_NAMES and BLOCK_REASON_HEADER — not referenced outside utils.ts (tests only call buildBlockReason and check output strings). Reordered to put const before usage.
